case_title: AMBIENT TEMPERATURE CONTROL, INC VS. SPECIALTY'S CAFE & BAKERY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SC-109 - AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (MICHAEL W. RUNESTRAND - OPPERATIONS MANAGER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMBIENT TEMPERATURE CONTROL, INC (AOS:MIKE RUNESTRAND)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $30.00) SERVED AUG-16-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPECIALTY'S CAFE & BAKERY, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/17/13. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SPECIALTY'S CAFE & BAKERY, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,556.00 FILED BY AMBIENT TEMPERATURE CONTROL, INC (AOS:MIKE RUNESTRAND) AS TO DEFENDANT SPECIALTY'S CAFE & BAKERY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-16-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-18-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. MEDIATED DISPOSITION", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. CASE SETTLED THROUGH COURT MEDIATION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL RUNESTRAND--OPERATIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANGELIA WOLL--MANAGER OF STORE DEVELOPMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
